milestone: Duplicate silently failing on large Worlds
slice: Follow-up bug found after the overflow-menu Duplicate fix: duplicating a World roughly doubles its storage footprint, and js/projectStore.js's duplicate() discarded a localStorage write failure silently -- the exact AV-009 class of bug, never applied to this code path. Now returns {ok,error} like save() does, and the Welcome-card/overflow-menu Duplicate actions show a real alert on failure instead of doing nothing. Verified via Playwright against a real, reproducible browser-level quota failure. goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged.
